experience_chunks.description: Designed and maintained the analytical data warehouse on Snowflake supporting the BI team's ~50 dashboards at Wayne Enterprises.
Backend development with Python (FastAPI), PostgreSQL, and Redis at a B2B SaaS product at Swiggy.
Implemented streaming data pipelines on Kafka and Spark Streaming for a real-time user-activity processing platform at Acme Corp.
Backend + data hybrid role at a growth-stage startup at Pied Piper.
Backend development with Python (FastAPI), PostgreSQL, and Redis at a B2B SaaS product at Unacademy.
Enterprise sales of cloud software solutions into the mid-market segment at Dunder Mifflin.
Test automation and QA engineering for a fintech product at Swiggy. Built and maintained the end-to-end test suite using Selenium and pytest.
Java backend development at a large enterprise — Spring Boot microservices, Kafka for inter-service messaging, Postgres + Redis for storage at Swiggy.
Android mobile development using Java and Kotlin at Hooli. Built and maintained multiple production features including the main shopping flow and push notification system.
